description: This file is the entry point for starting the server in a Node.js application. It imports the app module, starts listening on a specified port and host, and handles graceful shutdown on SIGTERM signals. It also exports the server instance.

methods.name: app.listen
methods.description: Starts the server listening on the specified port and host.

methods.name: process.on
methods.description: Registers a listener for the SIGTERM signal for graceful shutdown.

methods.name: server.close
methods.description: Closes the server, invoked during graceful shutdown.

methods.name: console.log
methods.description: Outputs messages to the logging console.

methods.name: process.exit
methods.description: Exits the process with a specified code after shutdown.
